case_title: TIMOTHY DEWITT VS. DOCTOR'S ASSOCIATES, INC.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-31-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DOCTOR'S ASSOCIATES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-18-2011 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO NOV-15-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. CONTINUED FOR JUDGE MITCHELL TO HEAR CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: B.PAREDES. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DOCTOR'S ASSOCIATES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEWITT, TIMOTHY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DOCTOR'S ASSOCIATES, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
